# Covert Communication

> Covert Communication LLC is a full-service marketing and brand agency: brand building, programmatic advertising, SEM/SEO/GEO/AEO, social media, fraud protection, and technology consulting. We do it all.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://covertcommunication.com/): Overview of the agency and everything we do
- [Services](https://covertcommunication.com/services): Full list of marketing and technology services
- [About](https://covertcommunication.com/about): The people, brands, and story behind Covert Communication
- [Case Studies](https://covertcommunication.com/case-studies): Selected client work and results
- [The Latest](https://covertcommunication.com/the-latest): Articles, podcast episodes, and updates
- [Contact](https://covertcommunication.com/contact): Get in touch to start a project

## Services

- [Technology Consulting](https://covertcommunication.com/services/technology): Web Development, App Development, Tech Strategy
- [Programmatic](https://covertcommunication.com/services/programmatic): SEM, AEO, GEO, SEO
- [Social Media](https://covertcommunication.com/services/social): Content Creation, Paid Social, Community Mgmt, Influencer Mktg
- [Fraud Protection Gurus](https://covertcommunication.com/services/fraud): Ad Fraud Detection, Click Fraud, Brand Safety
- [Brand Creation](https://covertcommunication.com/services/brand-creation): Brand Identity, Logo Design, Brand Guidelines
- [Traditional Full Service](https://covertcommunication.com/services/trad): Print, TV & Radio, Out of Home, Direct Mail, Events, PR
- [Brand Building](https://covertcommunication.com/services/brand-building): Strategy, Positioning, Campaigns, Analytics
- [Brand Specialties](https://covertcommunication.com/services/brand-specialties): Packaging, Copywriting, Photography, Video Prod., Experiential, Activation, Sponsorship

## About

- [Covert Communication](https://covertcommunication.com/about/covertcom): The full-service agency behind the brand.
- [Anna Covert](https://covertcommunication.com/about/anna): Founder, author, and the voice behind Covert Communication.
- [The Covert Team](https://covertcommunication.com/about/covertteam): The people who make it happen, every day.
- [Books](https://covertcommunication.com/about/books): Bestselling reads on marketing and the solar industry.
- [Podcasts](https://covertcommunication.com/about/podcasts): Conversations on marketing, media, and solar.
- [Other Brands](https://covertcommunication.com/about/otherbrands): Other ventures built by the Covert Communication team.

## Case studies

- [Wolf River Construction](https://covertcommunication.com/case-studies/wolf-river-construction): A Midwest roofing and exterior-renovation contractor rebranded and rebuilt on WordPress — with an interactive roofing calculator feeding an automated GoHighLevel and PostGrid follow-up engine.
- [Northwind SaaS](https://covertcommunication.com/case-studies/northwind-saas): A B2B SaaS marketing site rebuilt for speed and search — paired with an always-on programmatic engine.
- [Lumen Solar](https://covertcommunication.com/case-studies/lumen-solar): A solar installer relaunched with a clean identity, a lead-gen site, and a paid social program that fills the pipeline.
- [Meridian Health](https://covertcommunication.com/case-studies/meridian-health): A healthcare platform redesigned around patient clarity, accessibility, and organic discoverability.
- [Cobalt Fintech](https://covertcommunication.com/case-studies/cobalt-fintech): A fintech challenger positioned for its Series B — full rebrand, performance search, and a measurement stack that proves ROI.
- [Harbor Retail](https://covertcommunication.com/case-studies/harbor-retail): An omnichannel retail brand unified across print, broadcast, social, and a conversion-focused storefront.
